section_id: POEA Rules 2002 - Advantages for OFWs Applying Through POEA-GPB
title: Advantages for OFWs Applying to POEA for Overseas Employment
content:
The advantages that would accrue to Overseas Filipino Workers (OFWs) if they are employed overseas through the POEA-GPB include:

1. No placement fee
2. Employers and workers are closely monitored to avoid incidence of welfare or legal cases
3. Provision of Employee Guarantee Trust Fund
4. Processing cycle time is kept at a minimum to meet deployment date

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
